name: Black Cat-astrophe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>猫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>睨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>み
desc: During your opponent's Battle Phase, if you control 2 or more face-down Defense Position monsters: End the Battle Phase. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 2 face-up monsters on the field, including at least 1 "Prediction Princess" monster; change them to face-down Defense Position.
